channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Python (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Python nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐍 JuliusBrussee/caveman (52587 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: JuliusBrussee

📝 Repository: JuliusBrussee/caveman

📄 Descrizione: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

item.title: 🐍 safishamsi/graphify (39971 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: safishamsi

📝 Repository: safishamsi/graphify

📄 Descrizione: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

⭐ Stelle: 39971

🍴 Forks: 4409

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: antigravity claude-code codex gemini graphrag knowledge-graph leiden openclaw rag skills tree-sitter

📜 Licenza: MIT License

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-02T04:57:08Z

]]>

item.title: 🐍 OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-Nano (2667 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: OpenMOSS

📝 Repository: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-Nano

📄 Descrizione: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration.

⭐ Stelle: 2667

🍴 Forks: 342

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: audio-tokenizer chinese english multi-modality multilingual realtime streaming-audio tts voice-clone

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-10T16:25:07Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-04T05:20:10Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
